programs.title: The Man Who Killed Don Quixote
programs.desc: A disillusioned advertising executive is pulled into a time-jumping fantasy.

programs.title: The Nut Job
programs.desc: A rogue squirrel and his rat friend plan a heist of outrageous proportions.

programs.title: The Nut Job 2: Nutty by Nature
programs.desc: Animal friends join forces with a mischievous mouse to save their beloved park from the bulldozer.

programs.title: Stuart Little
programs.desc: Based on the book by E.B. White. Two human parents adopt a mouse as a little brother for their son.

programs.title: Stuart Little 2
programs.desc: Stuart is duped by a duplicitous bird who claims to be on the run from a malevolent falcon.

programs.title: School of Life
programs.desc: A new teacher and his crusty counterpart compete for an award.
